headline: A Look Back at General Industrial Machinery Stocks’ Q1 Earnings: Otis (NYSE:OTIS) Vs The Rest Of The Pack
summary: Wrapping up Q1 earnings, we look at the numbers and key takeaways for the general industrial machinery stocks, including Otis (NYSE:OTIS) and its peers.
